title: T-024 — UI: documents_hub_page + packing_slip_preview + bol_preview + modals (SHIP-020/021/025) (11-shipping-f)
prompt:
# T-024 — Documents Hub UI

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §15.4 SHIP-020 Packing Slip Preview, §15.4 SHIP-021 BOL Preview & Sign-off, §15.4 SHIP-025 Documents Hub, §13.5
UX: prototypes/design/11-SHIPPING-UX.md §3 SHIP-020/021
Prototypes:
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/doc-screens.jsx:4-104 (documents_hub_page)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/doc-screens.jsx:107-215 (packing_slip_preview_page)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/doc-screens.jsx:217-308 (bol_preview_page)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx:741-757 (packing_slip_regen_modal)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx:759-790 (bol_sign_upload_modal)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Component pages for documents hub + packing slip preview + BOL preview/sign + 2 modals.

## Implementation contract
1. `/(shipping)/documents/page.tsx` — documents_hub_page (doc-screens.jsx:4-104) — tabbed list (Packing Slips / BOLs / Signed BOLs) with status filter, search, and quick-actions per row.
2. `/(shipping)/documents/packing-slip/[shipmentId]/page.tsx` — packing_slip_preview_page (107-215) — server-rendered preview from generated PDF + Regenerate button + Download button.
3. `/(shipping)/documents/bol/[shipmentId]/page.tsx` — bol_preview_page (217-308) — preview + Sign-off CTA (opens bol_sign_upload_modal) + Download.
4. Modals:
   - `packing-slip-regen-modal.tsx` (modals.jsx:741-757) — confirms regen reason; calls T-023 regeneratePackingSlip.
   - `bol-sign-upload-modal.tsx` (modals.jsx:759-790) — file upload (PDF/JPG/PNG ≤10 MB) + driver_name + signature_date fields; optional PIN field (P2 e-sign); calls T-023 uploadSignedBOL.
5. Permission: `ship.pack.close` for regen; `ship.bol.sign` for upload; `ship.dashboard.view` for read.
6. BL-SHIP-10 fix: D365 DLQ dashboard link with event preview inline (consumer of T-029 DLQ).
7. Four states + i18n `shipping.docs.*`.

## Prototype parity
Verify against doc-screens.jsx:4-104 / :107-215 / :217-308 and modals.jsx:741-757 / :759-790. Do not paste JSX wholesale.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/documents/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/documents/_components/documents-hub-tabs.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/documents/packing-slip/[shipmentId]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/documents/bol/[shipmentId]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/_modals/packing-slip-regen-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/_modals/bol-sign-upload-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/documents/__tests__/documents-hub-tabs.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/messages/en/shipping.json [modify]
- apps/web/messages/pl/shipping.json [modify]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/doc-screens.jsx [ref]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given documents_hub_page renders, when compared to doc-screens.jsx:4-104, then tab list + filter row + quick-actions match — RTL + Playwright screenshot.
2. Given packing_slip_preview_page renders for a shipment with generated PDF, when compared to doc-screens.jsx:107-215, then preview viewer + Regenerate + Download buttons match.
3. Given bol-sign-upload-modal submits an >10MB file, when client validation runs, then it shows a warning and disables submit (server also re-validates).
4. Given user lacks ship.bol.sign, when bol_preview_page renders, then Sign-off CTA is hidden.
5. Given a row has a D365 DLQ entry, when documents_hub_page renders, then a clickable DLQ chip appears with inline event preview (BL-SHIP-10 fix).
6. UI closeout includes Playwright trace + screenshots per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY; Playwright fallback documented if unavailable.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL asserting parity + tab routing + file-size validation + permission gate + DLQ chip + four states.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run documents-hub-tabs.test.tsx`.
- Playwright `apps/web/e2e/shipping-documents-hub.spec.ts`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not import @radix-ui/react-dialog outside packages/ui.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not perpetuate BL-SHIP-10.
- Do not allow Sign-off CTA without ship.bol.sign.
- Do not implement multi-language dropdown (P2 per BL-SHIP-12).
- Do not regress accessibility (axe).

## BRCGS audit trail
BOL and POD document uploads store SHA-256 hash of the file + retention_until = uploaded_at + 7 years (BRCGS Issue 9 §3.5 / §14.4). Do not allow truncation.

pipeline_inputs.description: Documents hub + packing slip preview + BOL preview/sign UI + 2 modals + BL-SHIP-10 DLQ inline preview.
pipeline_inputs.details: PDF preview via react-pdf viewer or iframe. Server-side file size re-validation. Multi-language dropdown disabled (P2).
out_of_scope: Do not implement multi-language packing slip dropdown.
acceptance_criteria: Given documents_hub_page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/doc-screens.jsx:4-104, then tab list + filter row + quick-actions match prototype (parity checklist); AND given packing_slip_preview_page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/doc-screens.jsx:107-215, then preview viewer + Regenerate + Download match.
Given bol-sign-upload-modal submits >10MB file, when client validation runs, then warning shown and submit disabled (server-side FileTooLargeError also enforced).

Given user lacks ship.bol.sign, when bol_preview_page renders, then Sign-off CTA hidden; AND given a row has D365 DLQ entry, when documents_hub_page renders, then clickable DLQ chip with inline preview appears; AND BOL/POD records store SHA-256 hash + retention_until = uploaded_at + 7y (BRCGS §3.5).
UI closeout includes Playwright trace + screenshots per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY; Playwright fallback documented if unavailable.
test_strategy: RED: RTL parity + tab routing + file-size validation + permission gate + DLQ chip + four states.
risk_red_lines: Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
Do not allow Sign-off CTA without ship.bol.sign.
POD audit trail uses SHA-256 hash + 7-year retention (BRCGS Issue 9 §3.5) — do not allow truncation or premature deletion of signed BOL/POD records.
